DIFF_SCHEMA.summary: Refactor auth middleware to support OAuth provider plug-ins

findings.title: JWT secret read from process.env without validation
findings.evidence: process.env.JWT_SECRET used directly; no startup check
findings.suggestion: Validate at startup, throw if missing/short
